query: I need to check what's on the homepage of our staging site at staging.example.com — can you navigate there and take a screenshot?
go to reddit.com/r/ClaudeCode and find the top post title for me, I want to see what people are talking about
ok I need you to open up thinkbrowse and click through the onboarding flow on our app, screenshot each step so I can review the UX
can you scrape the pricing table from competitor.com and put it in a markdown table? use the browser to navigate there
fill out the contact form on our site with test data and submit it, I want to make sure the form works
browse to news.ycombinator.com and extract the top 5 headlines
I want to test if the login flow works on our app — navigate to /login, type in test credentials, click submit, and tell me what happens
open https://thinkbrowse.io/sessions and take a screenshot of the dashboard, then scroll down and screenshot again
use the CLI to attach to my chrome tab and click the Submit button on the page I have open
navigate to github.com/anthropics/skills and extract the README content
what's the weather in Austin today?
write a Python function that sorts a list of dictionaries by a nested key
fetch the contents of https://api.example.com/health and show me the JSON response
read the file at src/index.ts and explain what it does
help me write unit tests for the authentication middleware in our Express app
search my codebase for all uses of the deprecated getUserById function
create a new React component called UserProfile with name, email, and avatar props
run npm test and show me which tests are failing
download the CSV file from https://data.example.com/export.csv and parse it
explain the difference between useEffect and useLayoutEffect in React
